---
title: "Your First Application"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/03-first_app.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/03-first_app.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]
#| viewerHeight: 520

{{< include /../code/demos/app-01-intro.py >}}

```

```{shinylive-python}
#| standalone: true
#| components: [editor, viewer]
#| viewerHeight: 520

{{< include /../code/demos/app-02-intro_ui.py >}}

```

:::
